damaged_item.title: Damaged Item Refund Policy
damaged_item.content: Customers are eligible for a full refund or replacement for items damaged in transit within 7 days of delivery. A clear photo of the damaged item is strictly required before processing.

damaged_item.title: Return Shipping for Damaged Goods
damaged_item.content: Do not ask the customer to return the damaged item unless it is valued over $100. For items under $100, they may dispose of it after the refund is approved.

delayed_delivery.title: Late Delivery Protocol
delayed_delivery.content: If an order is delayed by more than 3 business days past the estimated delivery date, offer the customer a 15% discount code for their next purchase. If delayed by more than 10 days, offer a full refund.

billing_issue.title: Double Charge Policy
billing_issue.content: If a customer claims they were charged twice, apologize and immediately escalate the ticket to the Billing Support Team for verification. Do not promise a refund until billing verifies.

refund_request.title: Standard Change-of-Mind Return
refund_request.content: Unopened items can be returned for a full refund within 30 days. The customer is responsible for return shipping costs.
